title: Kids Create - A5 Writing Workbook Sheets - ABC Alphabet Letters, Wipe Clean Workbook for Ages 4+
features: KIDS WRITING WORKBOOK: This fantastic pack comes with 20 worksheets and a pen which is a great tool for helping young children start to learn their letters and improve their handwriting. The workbook is fully equiped with all letters of the alphabet in both cases: lower and capital - the dotted letters simply need to be traced with the pen that comes with the book. Kids are sure to enjoy this fun activity pack which will help them learn their alphabet and also improve their handwriting

FOLLOW THE DOTTED LINES: Using the sheets is simple! With dotted prompts on every sheet for every letter get children to practice their reading and writing by tracing the letters with the pen. To make learning more engaging there are wonderful colours and examples throughout the book of items, fruit and animals that have names that begin with the letter being studied. Practice again and again with the kids with these wipe clean worksheets

ENGAGING LEARNING WITH FUN: This letter worksheet and pen set is a fun and engaging way to get kids learning! The handwriting practice and letter book comes in the perfect size, so mothers can pop it in the bag for long trips - the writing sheets are sure to keep them entertained! This is an absolute essential homeschooling workbook and pen set which supports childhood educational development by helping children learn patterns to form letters

PARENTS WILL LOVE IT: This early years resources book will be loved by parents; the book helps make assisting kids learning easy and fun as it saves time on parents needing to plan their own resources! What more, this booklet can be wiped clean once practice is done and be used again! Learning is optimal when there is practice involved and this book and pen set is just the tool for that

KIDS LEARNING ACTIVITY PACK: Use this learning pack as a great starting school learning tool to fully get young children engaged in what they will be learning in reception class and first years classrooms. Use it as a learning tool or as a toddler activity book, the worksheets are great for both! the colourful sheets and big bold lettering is attention grabbing so are a sure way to keep the youngsters learning for longer
